name: GitLab Outbound Connector
description: Manage GitLab issues, branches, releases, and more

choices.name: List all releases by project ID
Get release by a tag name

properties.label: Project ID
properties.tooltip: The global ID or URL-encoded path of the project owned by the authenticated user

properties.label: Project ID
properties.tooltip: The global ID or URL-encoded path of the project owned by the authenticated user

properties.label: Project ID
properties.tooltip: The global ID or URL-encoded path of the project owned by the authenticated user

properties.label: Project ID
properties.tooltip: The global ID or URL-encoded path of the project owned by the authenticated user

properties.label: Project ID
properties.tooltip: The global ID or URL-encoded path of the project owned by the authenticated user

properties.label: Issue ID
properties.tooltip: The internal ID of a project’s issue

properties.label: Skip URL encoding
properties.description: Skip the default URL decoding and encoding behavior

properties.label: Issue ID
properties.tooltip: The internal ID of a project’s issue

properties.label: Issue ID
properties.tooltip: The internal ID of a project’s issue

properties.label: Note text
properties.tooltip: The content of a note

properties.label: Level on confidentiality
properties.tooltip: Indicates whether an issue has to be marked as internal or not

properties.label: Scope
properties.tooltip: Which issues to return: all issues, those created by the access token owner, or those assigned to the access token owner

properties.label: State
properties.tooltip: Return all issues or just those that are opened or closed

properties.label: Assignee ID
properties.tooltip: Return issues assigned to the given user ID. Mutually exclusive with 'Assignee username'. None returns unassigned issues. 'Any' returns issues with an assignee

properties.label: Assignee username
properties.tooltip: Return issues assigned to the given username. Similar to 'Assignee ID' and mutually exclusive with 'Assignee ID'

properties.label: Author ID
properties.tooltip: Return issues created by the given user ID

properties.label: Contains text
properties.tooltip: Search issues against their title and description

properties.value: ={"state":if searchIssueState = null then null else searchIssueState, "scope": if searchIssueScope = null then null else searchIssueScope, "assignee_id": if searchIssueAssigneeId = null then null else searchIssueAssigneeId, "assignee_username": if searchIssueAssigneeUsername = null then null else searchIssueAssigneeUsername, "author_id": if searchIssueAuthorId = null then null else searchIssueAuthorId, "search": if searchIssueSearch = null then null else searchIssueSearch}

properties.label: Tag name
properties.tooltip: The Git tag the release is associated with

properties.label: Tag name
properties.tooltip: The tag where the release is created from

properties.label: Ref
properties.tooltip: A commit SHA, another tag name, or a branch name

properties.value: ={"tag_name": if releaseTagName = null then null else releaseTagName, "name": if releaseName = null then null else releaseName, "description": if releaseDescription = null then releaseDescription else releaseDescription, "ref": if releaseRef = null then null else releaseRef}

properties.label: Search string
properties.tooltip: Return list of branches containing the search string

properties.label: Regular expression
properties.tooltip: Return list of branches with names matching a re2 regular expression

properties.value: ={"search": if searchString = null then null else searchString, "regex": if regex = null then null else regex}

properties.label: Reference
properties.tooltip: Branch name or commit SHA to create branch from

properties.value: ={"branch": if branchName = null then null else branchName, "ref": if ref = null then null else ref}

properties.label: Branch name
properties.tooltip: Name of the new branch to modify the file in. The commit is added to this branch

properties.label: Commit message
properties.tooltip: Message of the commit that modifies the file

properties.label: File path
properties.tooltip: URL-encoded full path to the file

properties.label: Author email
properties.tooltip: The commit author's email address

properties.label: Encoding
properties.tooltip: Change encoding to base64. GitLab's default is text

properties.label: Execute file mode
properties.tooltip: Enables or disables the execute flag on the file

properties.label: Start branch
properties.tooltip: Name of the base branch to start the new branch from

properties.label: Reference
properties.tooltip: Name of the branch, tag or commit the file is fetched from

properties.value: ={"branch": if branchName = null then null else branchName, "commit_message": if commitMessage = null then null else commitMessage, "content": if content = null then null else content, "author_email": if authorEmail = null then null else authorEmail, "author_name": if authorName = null then null else authorName, "encoding": if encoding = null then null else encoding, "execute_filemode": if executeFilemode = null then null else executeFilemode, "start_branch": if startBranch = null then null else startBranch}

properties.label: Allow collaboration
properties.tooltip: Allow commits from members who can merge to the target branch

properties.label: Assignee IDs
properties.tooltip: The ID of the users to assign the merge request to as an array of numbers

properties.label: Labels
properties.tooltip: Labels for the merge request, as a comma-separated list

properties.label: Remove source branch
properties.tooltip: Flag indicating if a merge request should remove the source branch when merging

properties.label: Reviewer IDs
properties.tooltip: The ID of the users added as a reviewer to the merge request as an array of numbers

properties.label: Squash
properties.tooltip: Indicates if the merge request is set to be squashed when merged. Project settings might override this value

properties.label: Target project ID
properties.tooltip: Numeric ID of the target project

properties.value: ={"source_branch": if sourceBranch = null then null else sourceBranch, "target_branch": if targetBranch = null then null else targetBranch, "title": if title = null then null else title, "assignee_ids": if assigneeIds = null then null else assigneeIds, "description": if description = null then null else description, "labels": if labels = null then null else labels, "milestone_id": if milestoneId = null then null else milestoneId, "remove_source_branch": if removeSourceBranch = null then null else removeSourceBranch, "reviewer_ids": if reviewerIds = null then null else reviewerIds, "squash": if squash = null then null else squash, "target_project_id": if targetProjectId = null then null else targetProjectId}

properties.label: Result variable
properties.tooltip: Name of variable to store the response in. result variable documentation

properties.label: Result expression
properties.tooltip: Expression to map the response into process variables. result expression documentation

properties.label: Error expression
properties.tooltip: Expression to handle errors. BPMN error handling documentation
